title: Trigger Error
description: Manually trigger a user error in script execution using trigger_error().
problemStatement:
Alert the developer! Use the `trigger_error()` function to send an error message `"Value too low"`. Specify the error type as `E_USER_NOTICE`.

**Requirement:** One line of code.
hints: This function is useful for debugging and enforcing logic constraints.
expectedOutput: A PHP Notice: Value too low
